ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the player */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team the player is facing */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary assigned to the player for fantasy purposes */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., active, injured reserve) */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Rookie year of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player concerned */,
  "points_actual" REAL /* Actual points scored by the player in the match */,
  "points_projected" REAL /* Projected points the player was expected to score */,
  "sdPts_projected" REAL /* Standard deviation of projected points */,
  "yards_rushing" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "yards_receiving" INTEGER /* Receiving yards gained by the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards thrown by the player */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Receiving touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Passing touchdowns thrown by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions thrown by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the current season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the current season */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties by the team in the current season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the lineup */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player included in the lineup */,
  "week" INTEGER /* NFL week number for which the lineup is created */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the lineup (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used for projections */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's methodology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing player data */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player concerned */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player concerned */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Reference to the player concerned */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "points_scored" REAL /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "yards_rushing" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards gained by the player in the season */,
  "yards_receiving" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards gained by the player in the season */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards thrown by the player in the season */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total rushing touchdowns scored by the player in the season */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total receiving touchdowns scored by the player in the season */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total passing touchdowns thrown by the player in the season */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions thrown by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
